_publications._publicationTitle: RABL6A Regulates Schwann Cell Senescence in an RB1-Dependent Manner.

_contextSnippet: cells lacking RABL6A proliferated significantly slower. Loss of RABL6A led to a dramatic reduction in phosphorylated RB1-S807/811 as well as stark upregulation of p16 expression
details: Induced cell cycle arrest in NHSCs without causing cell death, caused significant decrease in cell proliferation and dramatic reduction in phosphorylated RB1-S807/811
